title: transfer — HTTP routes
description: Six workspace groups + one platform-admin group. Every mutation runs through the queue — the HTTP handler only records the xfer_job and dispatches. Preview / dry-run / template are the sync exceptions. Downloads use signed URLs so an email link works without Sanctum session.

groups.name: workspace-transfer-ingest
groups.description: Import + sample-data initiation. `preview` and `dry-run` are synchronous; `imports` and `samples` create an xfer_job + queue.

routes.description: Create an import job. Multipart body: entity + file + mode + mapping_profile_id? + notifyChannels? + csv overrides? Returns 202 + xfer_job.
Sync. Parses the first N rows (config('transfer.preview.rows'), default 10) + returns detected headers + suggested mapping. No xfer_job written.
Sync. Runs the full import inside a rolled-back transaction. Returns counters + errors. No xfer_job written (creates a temporary job row deleted after response).
Create a sample-data generation job. Body: entity + count?. Returns 202 + xfer_job.

groups.name: workspace-transfer-egress
groups.description: Export initiation. `exports/stream` is the sync path for tiny data sets (row count ≤ entity's syncThreshold).

routes.description: Create an export job. Body: entity + format + filters? + include? + sort? + columns? + notifyChannels?. Returns 202 + xfer_job.
Sync inline stream. Refuses when the query would exceed the entity's syncThreshold + returns 413 with a hint to use the async endpoint. No xfer_job written.

groups.name: workspace-transfer-entities
groups.description: Read-only capability + template surface. Powers the frontend's 'Import / Export' picker screen.

routes.description: List every entity the caller can import / export / sample given permissions + feature toggles. Returns fields (headers, formats, required, examples) for the UI.
Full detail for one entity: field map, formats, permissions, defaults.
Download an empty template (?format=xlsx|csv). Headers reflect the entity's #[ImportField] map + locale.

groups.name: workspace-transfer-jobs
groups.description: Job history + control + artifact downloads. Downloads route uses signed URLs so email links work off-session (`transfer.signed-artifact` middleware validates the signature).

routes.description: List caller's xfer_jobs. Filterable via spatie/laravel-query-builder (filter[status], filter[kind], filter[entity], filter[created_at]).
Show one xfer_job with shards + artifacts.
Cancel a queued / running job. Sets status=cancelling.
Re-dispatch a single failed shard against the persisted source file. Increments XferShard.attempt.
Download the result artifact via signed URL. Signature-only auth so email links work off-session.
Download the errors artifact (only exists for partially_succeeded imports).

groups.name: workspace-transfer-mapping-profiles
groups.description: Saved header-remap profiles the caller may re-use. Owned by the caller unless marked `is_shared`.

groups.name: platform-transfer
groups.description: Platform-admin cross-workspace read for support triage + capacity planning. No mutation.

routes.description: Cross-workspace xfer_jobs list. Filter[workspace_id] + all workspace filters.
Full EntityRegistry dump for support inspection.
